summary: Implemented a shared UnifiedAudioManager React context and a bridge hook to sync MainPlayer state to a single audio manager instance; added WebAudio-only frequency playback with explicit console logs. However, the diff summary is truncated for `playSound` routing, so Android-native routing for non-frequency sounds (including clean soundId behavior and avoiding oscillator parsing) cannot be verified. Also includes unrequested/constraint-violating changes (e.g., edits to an immutable hook and visual/UI behavior changes).

missing_requirements.requirement: Non-frequency sounds (kids sleep sounds and peaceful sounds) must use Android native playback (window.AndroidAudio.playSound(cleanSoundId) without file extension) when available, and must not attempt oscillator-based frequency fallback/parsing for these sound IDs.
missing_requirements.reason: `useUnifiedAudioManager.ts` is truncated right as `playSound` begins ("Falls back to Web ..."), so there is no visible evidence that (a) Android native playback is used for non-frequency sounds when available, (b) the soundId is cleaned to have no file extension, and (c) oscillator parsing logic for `freq-###` is not executed for non-frequency sounds.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add clear developer-facing console logs for the routing decision for BOTH paths (frequency via WebAudio oscillator vs sound via Android native), ensuring they do not indicate the wrong path.
missing_requirements.reason: Frequency routing logs are clearly present, but the `playSound` implementation is truncated, so there is no visible evidence of the required Android-native routing logs for non-frequency sounds.
evidence: frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedAudioManager.ts (frequency logs present; sound routing/logs not visible due to truncation)

hallucinated_features.description: Modified an immutable hook file (`frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`) despite the constraint to not edit immutable hooks listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly forbids editing immutable hook files; the diff shows this file under MODIFIED FILES, and the request does not require any auth changes.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed theme background behavior to pulse based on audio intensity (visual synchronization layer).
hallucinated_features.reason: The request scope is audio routing and player-to-audio-manager synchronization; no UI/visual redesign was requested beyond restoring correct playback behavior.
Not requested by any requirement; appears to be meta/project documentation rather than part of the audio routing fix.
